name: City Gridlock
short_description: City traffic management game. Place road signs and traffic lights to optimize traffic to achieve the best efficiency. You can block or divert cars to avoid traffic jams. Increase road speed where necessary.
detailed_description:
This is a city traffic simulation game. You will have to solve various traffic problems to achieve good traffic efficiency. You will have to place road signs and traffic lights. Decide how to handle each traffic problem. Divert cars to different routes. Press GO and watch the city come to life. Cars will start driving through the city. Buses will stop at the stops. Cars will try to reach their destination and might get frustrated if stuck in traffic for too long.

- 10+ unique levels;
- Place and program traffic lights;
- Divert cars using road-blocking signs;
- Unlock new game features;
- Increase your level;
- Compare your score against other players;
- No ads, timers, or locked-out content behind in-app purchases.
